Convocation 2025 Thirteenth Annual Convocation on 29th March 2025 at 9:30 AM at the IIM Tiruchirappalli campus. All Photos Watch Full Video Academic Programmes Post Graduate Programmes PGPM (MBA) The two-year full-time Post Graduate Programme in Management is the flagship programme of IIMT and it's objective is to develop young women and men into competent professional managers. PGPM HR (MBA HR) Post-Graduate Programme in Management-Human Resources is a two-year full-time programme launched in 2020 and is the first domain-specific programme of IIMT. PGPBM (MBA for Working Executives) The Post Graduate Programme in Business Management at the Chennai Campus is to groom working executives who aspire to move into senior leadership roles. Doctoral Programmes Ph.D (Doctoral Programme) The Doctoral Programme in Management is a full-time residential doctoral programme that offers students opportunities for research in different areas of Management. Executive Ph.D (Executive Doctoral Programme) The Executive Doctoral Programme in Management is a non-residential doctoral programme designed for senior executives from various sectors. Executive Education In-Company MDP EEC is engaging with various Organizations, Corporates, Government Bodies / Departments at both State as well as Central levels Public Sector Enterprises, and Technical Institutions, to conduct in company MDPs Open MDP Open MDPs are to equip working executives and practicing managers with the necessary skills and capabilities to fathom the macro and micro environment of business. Online @ IIMT The online programmes are delivered through online platform viz. Direct to Device during weekends. The duration of the certificate courses would be between 9 to 12 months Research Audit Committee Characteristics and Inter-Corporate Loans: Indian Evidence Prof. Bipin Kumar Dixit GVC Participation and Labour Market Disparities: Exploring the Effects on Employment and Wage Inequality Prof. Renjith R Exploring Social Media Hiring: A Qualitative Inquiry Into Cybervetting, Procedural Fairness, and Network‐Based Recruitment Prof. Shameem S Guanxi in turmoil: role of employee vigor in combating defensive silence and workplace incivility Prof. Shameeem S Examining the dynamics of Electric Vehicle adoption using Malmquist-DEA: Evidence from an emerging economy Prof. Gajanand M S An AI-Based Framework for Interpretable Mental Health Literacy Segmentation and Decision Support Prof. M Vimala Rani Accreditation IIM Tiruchirappalli's flagship programmes, the Post Graduate Programme in Management (PGPM), Post Graduate Programme in Management Human Resources (PGPM HR), and Post Gra .... duate Programme in Business Management (PGPBM) offered at the Chennai Campus were accredited by the Association of MBAs (AMBA), a prestigious international body, on September 27, 2022. Read More IIM Tiruchirappalli obtained membership of the Association to Advance Collegiate Schools of Business (AACSB) on May 3, 2023. This membership marks a significant .... step in the institute's journey to achieving global standards in management education and reflects its commitment to continuous improvement, innovation, and academic excellence. Read More Faculty IIM Trichy has 59 full-time faculty members. We also invite visiting faculty members to share their expertise for the domain-specific elective courses. In addition to the teaching responsibilities, the faculty members are actively involved in research, consultancy, and administration. Placement Over the past 14 years, our MBA program has been producing top-quality, future-ready business graduates, well-placed alumni in significant companies across the globe and has rightly earned the confidence of various recruiters. Learning Resource Centre The Library has been called as Learning Resource Centre (LRC) which offers a vibrant and state-of-the-art learning environment consisting of a dedicated Business and Management related resources. 360° Virtual Tour Mobile and VR ready self-guided virtual tour of IIM Tiruchirappalli campus with high quality 360° panoramic photographs to discover spaces that aren't even available on an in-person campus tour, such as classrooms, laboratories, and more.
